name: Dijon Flank Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the flank steak with Dijon mustard.
2. Marinate for 6 to 8 hours in the refrigerator.
3. Coat both sides of the steak with fresh ground black pepper.
4. Grill for 6 to 8 minutes per side or until desired level of doneness is reached.
5. Slice across the grain. Yield: 6 servings.
